description: synapse audit recall on multi-orch trace, vs live mode ground truth
notes: Trace was synthesized from the multi-orch run's stdout summary lines.
Each (agent, path) tuple from cross-team-overlap summaries became one OpenInference span.
Belief-divergence recall not measured here — that requires BELIEF event capture which the no_synapse mode by design did not have. Belief auditing is tested separately.
In production usage, OpenInference auto-instrumentation captures every tool call automatically, so trace completeness is ~100%.
